Flow.description: Portal Screen flow which is the final screen in the create/edit process that validates the Batch details against the award and baselines

formulas.name: flaStatusCanBeApproved
formulas.expression: ISPICKVAL({!Batch.ABS_Status__c}, 'Draft') || ISPICKVAL({!Batch.ABS_Status__c}, 'Review') || ISPICKVAL({!Batch.ABS_Status__c}, 'Withdrawn') || ISPICKVAL({!Batch.ABS_Status__c}, 'Returned by PSO')

Flow.label: ABS - Validation Screen

fields.name: TitleText
fields.fieldText: Validation Review

fields.name: batchId
fields.fieldText:
{!BatchDisplayId}

Version {!Batch.Version_Number__c}

fields.name: ValidationNarative
fields.fieldText:
Please review the following validation points to ensure your batch submission is complete and accurate. All items must be flagged as green or amber before submitting. If any are flagged as an error in Red, please make the necessary corrections on the relevant page otherwise you will not be able to submit the batch.


﻿Warnings in Amber will NOT stop the batch from being Submitted and or Approved

fields.name: CostValidationsTitle
fields.fieldText: Cost Validations

fields.name: Cost_Validation_Display
fields.fieldText: {!txtCostValidations}

fields.name: CostsValidatedCorrely
fields.fieldText: All Costs have validated correctly

fields.name: InconsistantCosts
fields.fieldText: ERROR: The Total Costs inputted on the Spend per Homes screens does not equal the total costs of the Measures plus Capital Expenditures

fields.name: BaselineSpendTitle
fields.fieldText: Baseline Spend Validations

fields.name: CostValidationWarning
fields.fieldText: All Baseline Spends have validated correctly

fields.name: FY1CostWarning
fields.fieldText:
ERROR: You have exceeded your Financial Year {!Batch.FY1_Baseline__r.Parent_Time_Period__r.Time_Period_Sequence_Number__c} Spend Allocation. You cannot draw down more funding than you have been allocated for a given financial year, and your allocation can only be changed by submitting a change request to DESNZ to consider.


FY {!Batch.FY1_Baseline__r.Parent_Time_Period__r.Time_Period_Sequence_Number__c} Approved batches spend plus current: ﻿{!varFY1SpendApprovedPlusCurrent}

FY {!Batch.FY1_Baseline__r.Parent_Time_Period__r.Time_Period_Sequence_Number__c} Spend baseline: {!Batch.FY1_Baseline__r.Baseline_Total_Grant_Spend__c}

fields.name: FY2CostWarning
fields.fieldText:
ERROR: You have exceeded your Financial Year {!Batch.FY2_Baseline__r.Parent_Time_Period__r.Time_Period_Sequence_Number__c} Spend Allocation. You cannot draw down more funding than you have been allocated for a given financial year, and your allocation can only be changed by submitting a change request to DESNZ to consider.


FY {!Batch.FY2_Baseline__r.Parent_Time_Period__r.Time_Period_Sequence_Number__c} Approved batches spend plus current: ﻿{!varFY2SpendApprovedPlusCurrent}

FY {!Batch.FY2_Baseline__r.Parent_Time_Period__r.Time_Period_Sequence_Number__c} Spend baseline: {!Batch.FY2_Baseline__r.Baseline_Total_Grant_Spend__c}

fields.name: FY3CostWarning
fields.fieldText:
ERROR: You have exceeded your Financial Year {!Batch.FY3_Baseline__r.Parent_Time_Period__r.Time_Period_Sequence_Number__c} Spend Allocation. You cannot draw down more funding than you have been allocated for a given financial year, and your allocation can only be changed by submitting a change request to DESNZ to consider.


FY {!Batch.FY3_Baseline__r.Parent_Time_Period__r.Time_Period_Sequence_Number__c} Approved batches spend plus current: ﻿{!varFY3SpendApprovedPlusCurrent}

FY {!Batch.FY3_Baseline__r.Parent_Time_Period__r.Time_Period_Sequence_Number__c} Spend baseline: {!Batch.FY3_Baseline__r.Baseline_Total_Grant_Spend__c}

fields.name: awardCostWarning
fields.fieldText: WARNING: Award Spend Baseline will be breached by this batch

fields.name: prMatchedText
fields.fieldText:
50%+ matched funding for PRS

(50% funded homes)

fields.name: PrivateRentedLandlordFunding
fields.fieldText: Private Rented Matched Landlord Funding is adequate for this batch

fields.name: PrivateRentedLandlordFundingWarning
fields.fieldText: ERROR: Private Rented Matched Landlord Funding is inadequate for this batch

fields.name: socialMatchedText
fields.fieldText:
50%+ matched funding for Social Homes

(50% funded homes)

fields.name: SocialHomesLandlordFunding
fields.fieldText: Social Homes Matched Landlord Funding is adequate for this batch

fields.name: SocialHomesLandlordFundingWArning
fields.fieldText: ERROR: Private Rented Matched Landlord Funding is inadequate for this batch

fields.name: greenAmber
fields.fieldText: Green/Amber CMs/GR Leads

fields.name: AllGreenDisplay
fields.fieldText: All Local Authorities on the batch are Green Lighted

fields.name: AmberDisplay
fields.fieldText: WARNING: One or more Local Authorities on the batch are Amber Lighted

fields.name: RedDisplay
fields.fieldText: WARNING: One or more Local Authorities on the batch are Red Lighted

fields.name: HomesValidationTitle
fields.fieldText: Homes

fields.name: homesValidatedCorrectly
fields.fieldText: All homes have validated correctly

fields.name: SocialHomesWarning
fields.fieldText: WARNING: The number of homes in this batch exceeds 50% of the total number of homes to be delivered in the Financial Year

fields.name: SocialHousesProjectError
fields.fieldText: ERROR: The number of social housing homes in this batch exceeds the allowance for this project

visibilityRule.conditionLogic: (1 OR 3) AND 2 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND 7 AND 8 AND 9 AND 10

textTemplates.name: txtCostValidations
textTemplates.text:
Total Home Costs-(Total Measure Costs+Total Capital Expenditure Costs)=Total Costs Difference (must be 0)
£{!refetchBatch.Total_of_Spend_Per_House__c}£{!refetchBatch.Total_Measure_Spend__c}£{!refetchBatch.Total_Capital_Expenditure__c}{!flaTotalCostDifference}
